title: verbascum × digitalis
intro: Verbascum × digitalis, also known as the foxglove plant, is a biennial herb with tall spikes of showy, bell-shaped flowers in shades of white, pink, and purple. The leaves and flowers of the foxglove plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including heart conditions and high blood pressure, due to their digitalis glycosides content, which has a positive inotropic effect on the heart. The health benefits of Verbascum × digitalis include improved cardiovascular health, increased energy, and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers are typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or capsules to utilize their medicinal properties, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
